texto: Despite what everyone thinks, hatred is what makes the world goes round not love. Just look at Hitler, he changed the world with his hatred so did Abraham Lincoln. He didn’t free the slaves out of love, he simply hated the Confederates so he did something to piss them off and win the war.
explicacao: Citação de Hermione Daguin sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “Despite what everyone thinks, hatred is what makes the world goes round not love. Just look at Hi…” articula reflexao, hatred, history em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como mudanca e history.

frase_original: Despite what everyone thinks, hatred is what makes the world goes round not love. Just look at Hitler, he changed the world with his hatred so did Abraham Lincoln. He didn’t free the slaves out of love, he simply hated the Confederates so he did something to piss them off and win the war.
